scripts.lint: eslint src e2e playwright.config.ts vitest.config.ts next.config.ts --max-warnings 0
scripts.test:e2e:onboarding: E2E_ONBOARDING_BLOCKING=1 E2E_ONBOARDING_A11Y=1 E2E_ONBOARDING_EXPORT=1 playwright test e2e/onboarding-calibration.spec.ts e2e/authenticated.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:onboarding-deep: PLAYWRIGHT_ONBOARDING_DEEP=1 E2E_ONBOARDING_BLOCKING=1 E2E_ONBOARDING_A11Y=1 E2E_ONBOARDING_EXPORT=1 playwright test e2e/onboarding-calibration.spec.ts e2e/security-api.spec.ts
scripts.check:v7-suite: npm run check:v7-hrefs:strict && npm run check:v7-vocabulary && npm run check:route-inventory && npm run check:plan-ia && npm run check:refinement-api-coverage
scripts.check:ci-verify-extras: npm run check:outbound-events-context && npm run audit:client-hash-targets && npm run audit:core-email-copy:strict && npm run audit:nav-primary-vs-metadata && npm run audit:core-metadata && npm run audit:refinement-surface-area && npm run audit:marketing-identity:strict && npm run audit:ui-operational:strict
scripts.report:security-docs: npm run report:security-api-coverage && npm run report:security-api-auth-heuristics && npm run report:security-server-actions && npm run report:security-lib-admin
scripts.security:sweep:quarterly: npm run report:security-docs && npm run check:security-static:grep
scripts.security:sweep:full: npm run report:security-docs && npm run check:security-static && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.perf:sweep:quarterly: npm run check:performance-static && npm run build
scripts.perf:sweep:full: npm run perf:sweep:quarterly && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run analyze
scripts.qa:sweep:ci-static: npm audit --audit-level=high && npm run check:security-static:grep && npm run check:performance-static:strict && npm run check:migrations && npm run check:api-route-tests && npm run check:vercel-cron && npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.qa:sweep:local-ci: npm run qa:sweep:ci-static && npm run qa:sweep:ci-unit
scripts.qa:sweep:extended: npm run qa:sweep:local-ci && npm run check:qa-loading-routes && npm run check:qa-route-coverage-tsv && npm run check:qa-bug-log && npm run check:refinement-acceptance-commands
scripts.verify: npm run check:migrations && npm run check:api-route-tests && npm run check:server-action-exports && npm run check:api-workspace-eligibility:strict && npm run check:v7-suite && npm run check:vercel-cron && npm run check:ci-verify-extras && npm run audit:core-terminology && npm run audit:core-terminology:strict && npm run check:qa-loading-routes && npm run check:qa-route-coverage-tsv && npm run check:qa-bug-log && npm run check:refinement-acceptance-commands && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage && npm run build
scripts.verify:security: npm run check:security-static:strict:grep && npm run check:api-route-tests && npm run check:server-action-exports && npm run check:api-route-rate-limit-coverage && npm run check:cron-route-auth && npm run check:api-workspace-eligibility:strict && npm run check:server-lib-admin && npm run check:tracked-secrets-hygiene && npm run check:env-example-parity && npm run check:github-workflows-security && npm run check:pwa-well-known && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
